title: Failed to cancel appointment
evidence: human_agent: I'm unable to complete the cancellation right now. I'll connect you to our patient support team.
should_have: The agent should have processed the cancellation request directly instead of transferring the patient.

title: Ignored patient's repeated request
evidence: patient_bot: I still need to cancel my appointment. Can you do that?
should_have: The agent should have acknowledged the patient's repeated request to cancel the appointment and taken action.

title: Disconnected without resolution
evidence: human_agent: Hello, you've reached the pretty good. AI test line, goodbye.
should_have: The agent should have ensured the patient was connected to the appropriate support team or provided a resolution before ending the call.

title: Unnatural and robotic responses
evidence: human_agent: For quality and training purposes, but thanks for calling Tibet Point Orthopedics, part of pretty good. AI.
should_have: The agent should have used a more natural and conversational tone, avoiding scripted phrases that sound robotic.
